pages.title: smaapi (SMA) — Enterprise AI Gateway: Unified Multi-Model Access, Smart Routing, Governance & Audit
pages.description: smaapi (SMA, Slime Mould Architecture) is an enterprise AI gateway / model access platform: one OpenAI-compatible API for many LLM providers, with smart routing, cost and permission governance, and full audit trails.

pages.description: An enterprise LLM gateway is a unified access and governance layer between your applications and multiple LLM providers: one OpenAI-compatible API, smart routing, cost and permission governance, full audit trails.

pages.title: OneAPI for Enterprise? Self-Hosted LLM Relays vs Enterprise AI Gateways | smaapi
pages.description: OneAPI-style self-hosted relays fit individuals and small teams. Enterprises break on governance: permissions, audit, SLA, compliance. Where the boundary lies and when to migrate.
